ops.content: func HandleProxy(ctx context.Context, controlCtx context.Context, _ proxy.DecryptFn, conn net.Conn, out *proxy.ProxyDialer, connId string, _ *anypb.Any, _ proxy.RecordingManager) (proxy.ProxyConnFn, error) {

part.text:
Implemented control‑context injection into proxy handling:

* Updated the `handleProxy` signature in `worker/proxy/tcp/tcp.go` to accept an additional `controlCtx context.Context` parameter.
* Adjusted the call site in `worker/handler.go` to pass the request‑level context as the control context when invoking the proxy handler.
* Updated imports accordingly to reference the new handler signature.
